original: Breast implants that grant a flat increase to at least DD cup, and temporarily grow in size every time the user experiences an orgasm, reacting to climactic pleasure by expanding slightly. While the implant eventually returns to normal size after a few hours, a particularly lascivious user can keep them perpetually expanded - and expanding - until they’re so grossly endowed as to make walking a chore! Extreme size comes with an inherent increase to libido, however!
